item.title: Barbie and Godzilla aren’t scared of GTA6
item.content:encoded:
The biggest video games have been running scared from Grand Theft Auto VI’s release window so it’s up to two legends to take a stand. In 2023 it was Barbenheimer, for 2026 it’s Barbzilla!

Launching on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC via Steam on 3rd November 2026 is Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered, a remake of the surprisingly fun Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters from 2002.

It is essentially a beat ’em up featuring Godzilla and his kaiju sized pals whacking seven shades out of each other. I vaguely remember playing this on PS2 and it was lots of smashy fun.

Key Features

  • The original 2002 Godzilla arena fighter, remastered.
  • 12 Kaiju to choose from, each with a uniquely vicious moveset.
  • Eight locations, including recreated real-world cities, Monster Island, and the Alien Mothership.
  • Gallery items to unlock.
  • Play with friends in local cooperative play and all-new online multiplayer.
  • Remastered graphics enhance the cinematic experience of the original.
  • Improved unlock system gives you the choice to unlock monsters, locations, and gallery items in any order.
  • Also includes additional single-player campaigns for each kaiju.

A week later the somewhat smaller,  but no less mighty, Barbie enters the fray with Barbie Rewind, a collection of 16 classic Barbie games from 1991 through 2007, including the never-before-released game, Barbie: Vacation Adventure.

As Barbie can do anything the games are quite varied and include horse riding, snowboarding, modelling, and that time when Barbie became a secret agent and could become invisible.

The games includes:

  • Barbie
  • Barbie Game Girl
  • Barbie Super Model
  • Barbie Vacation Adventure
  • Barbie: Race & Ride
  • Barbie Super Sports
  • Barbie: Pet Rescue
  • Barbie: Groovy Games
  • Super Agent Barbie: Royal Jewel Mission
  • Barbie Horse Adventures Blue Ribbon Race
  • The Barbie Diaries: High School Mystery

Barbie rewind is coming to PS5 and Nintendo Switch, and there’s a collectors edition for Switch players with an exclusive Barbie doll.

Source: Press release



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/07/barbie-and-godzilla-arent-scared-of-gta6/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
